task: Ensure README.md has H1 '# Meta-Utilities', a '## Purpose' section containing the word purpose, and a status badge containing the word status. Do not delete existing useful content; prefer additive edits.

rule_specs: Meta-Utilities README must include Purpose and status
validation.validation_cmd: grep -E '^# Meta-Utilities' README.md && grep -E 'status|Status|badge' README.md && grep -E '## Purpose|purpose' README.md

task: Add or update CONTRIBUTING.md with sections: Overview, Local setup, Pull requests. Keep it under 80 lines. Mention Meta-Utilities once in the Overview.

rule_specs: CONTRIBUTING must have Overview Local setup Pull requests
validation.validation_cmd: test -f CONTRIBUTING.md && grep -E '## Overview|Overview' CONTRIBUTING.md && grep -E '## Local setup|Local setup' CONTRIBUTING.md && grep -E '## Pull requests|Pull requests' CONTRIBUTING.md

task: Create scripts/smoke_check.sh that exits 0 and prints SMOKE_OK. Make it executable in git (file mode 100755). Keep the script under 20 lines.

validation.validation_cmd: test -f scripts/smoke_check.sh && grep -q SMOKE_OK scripts/smoke_check.sh && test -x scripts/smoke_check.sh && ./scripts/smoke_check.sh | grep -q SMOKE_OK

pr_body: BrightforestX concurrency batch job 3/3 — exercises shell validation_cmd.
